title: Information Flow in a Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU)
description: A flowchart illustrating the gating mechanisms and data flow within a single GRU cell, showing how it selectively remembers and forgets information over time.
relationships: Input and previous state feed into both gates
Reset gate modulates the influence of previous state on candidate
Update gate blends previous state and candidate to produce new state
New hidden state becomes the output and input for next step
